html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
	<meta charset="UTF-8">
	<meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no">
	<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, minimum-scale=1, user-scalable=yes">
	<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="20;URL=https://www.npr-riken.co.jp/">
	
	<title>リケンNPR株式会社</title>
	
	<meta name="Keywords" content="リケンNPR株式会社,日本ピストンリング株式会社,株式会社リケン,RIKEN,NPR">
	<meta name="Description" content="株式会社リケンのウェブサイトは、2026年4月のリケンNPRグループ組織再編に伴い閉鎖となりました。">
	<meta name="author" content="リケンNPR株式会社">
	<meta name="robots" content="NOYDIR,NOODP,INDEX,FOLLOW">
	
	<style>
		* {
			line-height: 1.8;
			box-sizing: border-box;
		}
		
		html, #home {
			height: 100%;
			margin: 0; padding: 0;
			}
			#container {
				position: relative;
				min-height: 100%;
				padding: 10px 10px 20px;
				display: flex;
				flex-direction: column;
				align-items: center;
				justify-content: center;
				border: 7px solid #00b0ec;
				}
				/*#container:before {
					position: absolute;
					left: 0; top: 0;
					width: 2000px; height: 500px;
					display: block;
					content: "";
					background: #9ed8f6;
					transform: translate(-65%,-65%) rotate(-15deg);
					mix-blend-mode: darken;
					}*/
		
				h1 {
					line-height: 1;
					}
		
				section {
					padding: 30px 10px;
					}
					section:nth-last-of-type(1) { border-top: 1px dotted #ccc; }
		
					h2 {
						margin: 0 0 30px; padding: 0;
						text-align: center;
						}
		
					p { text-align: center; }
		
					p.btnDefault {
						margin: 30px 0 25px;
						text-align: center;
						}
						p.btnDefault a {
							position: relative;
							padding: 13px 50px 13px 25px;
							display: inline-flex;
							align-items: center;
							justify-content: center;
							color: #fff;
							line-height: 1.3;
							text-align: left;
							text-decoration: none;
							background: #007da8;
							border-radius: 50px;
							transition: all ease-out .3s;
							}
							p.btnDefault a:before {
								position: absolute;
								right: 8px; top: 50%;
								height: 32px;
								aspect-ratio: 1/1;
								display: block;
								content: "";
								background: #fff;
								border-radius: 50%;
								transform: translateY(-50%);
								}
		
							p.btnDefault a:after {
								position: absolute;
								right: 20px; top: 50%;
								width: 8px; height: 8px;
								display: block;
								content: "";
								border-top: 2px solid #007da8;
								border-right: 2px solid #007da8;
								transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg);
								transition: all ease-out .3s;
								}
		
							p.btnDefault a img {
								position: absolute;
								right: 19px; top: 50%;
								display: block;
								content: "";
								transform: translateY(-50%);
								}
		
							p.btnDefault a:hover, p.btnDefault a:focus-within { background: #0043a8; }
							p.btnDefault a:hover:after, p.btnDefault a:focus-within:after {
								right: 17px;
								border-color: #0043a8;
								}
		
		
	</style>
	
	<!--<link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/x-icon" href="data:image/x-icon;base64,">-->
	<!--<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">-->
	<link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/x-icon" href="https://www.npr-riken.co.jp/favicon.ico">
	<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://www.npr-riken.co.jp/apple-touch-icon-180x180.png">

</head>

<body id="home">
	<div id="container">
		<header>
			<h1><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="リケンNPR株式会社"></h1>
		</header>
		<main>
			<article>
				<section>
					<h2>ホームページ閉鎖のお知らせ</h2>
					<p>株式会社リケンのウェブサイトは、2026年4月のリケンNPRグループ組織再編に伴い閉鎖となりました。<br>
					今後は、リケンNPR株式会社のウェブサイトをご確認ください。</p>
					<p class="btnDefault"><a href="https://www.npr-riken.co.jp/">リケンNPR株式会社ウェブサイトはこちら</a></p>
					<p class="txtSmall">20秒後に、自動でリケンNPRウェブサイトに転送されます</p>
				</section>
				<section>
					<h2>Notice of Website Closure</h2>
					<p>The website of RIKEN CORPORATION has been closed due to the organizational restructuring of the NPR-RIKEN Group in April 2026.<br>
					Please refer to the website of NPR-RIKEN CORPORATION from now on.</p>
					<p class="btnDefault"><a href="https://www.npr-riken.co.jp/en/">Click here to visit the NPR-RIKEN CORPORATION website.</a></p>
					<p class="txtSmall">You will be redirected to the NPR-RIKEN Co., Ltd. website (Japanese page) in 20 seconds.<br>
					If you are not automatically redirected, please click the button above.</p>
				</section>
			</article>
		</main>
		<footer>
			<p>Copyright (C) 2023 NPR-RIKEN CORPORATION. All rights reserved.</p>
		</footer>
	</div><!-- } container -->
</body>
</html>
